---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for HAB
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is Your Feature Request Related to a Problem?
A clear description of the problem or limitation you're facing.

## Describe the Solution You'd Like
What you want to happen and how it should work.

## Describe Alternatives
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Implementation Ideas (Optional)
Any thoughts on how this could be implemented, including relevant files or modules.

## Additional Context
Screenshots, references to other projects, or any other useful context.
